module.name: setops
module.description: A two-set Venn diagram with a set OPERATION region highlighted: union, intersection, difference, symmetric difference, or complement — inside a universe box U.
module.aiSpec:
A SET-OPERATION diagram: two circles A and B inside a universe rectangle U, with the region for one operation shaded. Params only (no body). Use @venn for a plain 2–3 set diagram with member lists; @setops is for showing WHICH region an operation selects.
Parameters: `op` — which region to shade: union | intersect | a-only | b-only | xor | complement | none (default intersect). `a` / `b` — circle labels (default A, B). `formula` — caption under the diagram (Markdown, so \( \) math works, e.g. \(A \cup B\); default none). `color` — highlight colour of the shaded region (default theme accent). `intensity` — 0–100 shade opacity percentage of the highlight (default 40). `width` — CSS width of the diagram (default blank = 380px), e.g. 260px or 60%. `showu` — true | false (default true): show the "U" universe label. `frame` — true | false (default true): draw the universe rectangle border.
Example: <!-- @setops op: xor, a: Cats, b: Dogs, formula: \(A \triangle B\), intensity: 55, width: 300px -->

param.name: formula
param.label: Caption formula
param.desc: Caption below the diagram; \( \) math works.

param.name: width
param.label: Width
param.desc: CSS width of the diagram; blank = 380px.

snippet.label: Set operation (Venn region)
snippet.description: Two-set diagram with the operation's region shaded.
